title: Which Eva character do you want to go out with
display_title: Which Eva character do you want to go out with
wikitext:
[]: Which Eva character do you want to go out with?             Quote Post by The Sandman » Sun Sep 18, 2005 5:09 pm If there was a topic similar to this then I'm sorry. I'm to lazy. (Hey today's my birthday. I have the right to be lazy.) Anyways which character do you want to have a date with if he/she is real? For me well their a couple of women that I want to go out. Asuka Misato Risuko Well that's my list.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Sep 18, 2005 5:18 pm Id probly mesh best with Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Sun Sep 18, 2005 5:41 pm Kaji. Because he's the sexiest anime character ever.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Sun Sep 18, 2005 6:35 pm Asuka... Because Asuka is just so... Asuka..

[]:             Quote Post by Crazyman42 » Sun Sep 18, 2005 6:49 pm None of them, because they are all so fucked up.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Sun Sep 18, 2005 7:32 pm Crazyman42 wrote: None of them, because they are all so fucked up.

[]:             Quote Post by akda1ndaonly1 » Sun Sep 18, 2005 8:51 pm Shnooks wrote: Omg, and Shinji so I could squeeze him all day. he's so friggin cute.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Sep 18, 2005 11:20 pm Misato definatly, she has her problems, but she is so my type! As for Asuka and Rei, I wouldnt go out with them if you paid me, they have too many problems. If it was Asuka she'd be yelling at me all the time and if it was Rei there'd be an awkward silence everytime we sat down to eat. Being sexy will only get you so far if you got the sort of problems they do. As for the other women in Eva, Yuis too down to earth and she also changes into a big biomechanical cyborg, so no not yui. Hikaris also too down to earth Ritsuko and her mom are both too crazy for me, always killing Reis and whatnot, so not them either. So yeah its gotta be Misato, none of the others will do for me :o

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Mon Sep 19, 2005 5:23 am None of them, because they're all so fu- Oh wait. Well, in that case, what he said.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Mon Sep 19, 2005 8:18 am Crazyman42 wrote: None of them, because they are all so fucked up.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Mon Sep 19, 2005 10:58 am i'm not fussy. Misato Asuka Rei *drools* geuss the favourite? don't mind the silences; just like me

[]:             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Mon Sep 19, 2005 11:56 am I'd most definately go out with Rei since I am always fond of the quiet species of girls. Plus I have a thing about blue haired, crimson eyes girls. *sighs with great pleasure*

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Mon Sep 19, 2005 12:28 pm :shock: Freak!

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Sep 19, 2005 12:34 pm Trowa_Ayanami wrote: I'd most definately go out with Rei since I am always fond of the quiet species of girls. Plus I have a thing about blue haired, crimson eyes girls. *sighs with great pleasure*

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 19, 2005 1:44 pm Let's see - assume 2015 characters - Naoko - dead Yui, Kyoko - not my type :) Maya - I'm not her type Class A-2 - waaay underage (and I'd stay well clear of Asuka : for all she needs hugs and cuddles, I wouldn't want the problem of having to keep her hands off my bod ) Misato - OK as a trophy, an arm decoration, if as wild in bed as advertised, but probably too much like hard work : I'm no neat freak, but I have my limits Risuko - more my type, but she'd have to cut out her noticeable bad habit (admittedly, so would Misato...)

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Mon Sep 19, 2005 1:48 pm If I was younger: 1) Asuka 2) Rei As it stands... 1) Misato 2) Yui 3) Ritsuko This is purely based on physical assets. I threw personalities out the door by episode 9.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Sep 19, 2005 5:25 pm Maya or Hikari. Not only are they two of the saner characters of Eva, they are also so gosh-darn cute ! :P

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Mon Sep 19, 2005 6:24 pm Man, I cant believe people's mental problems would freak ya out! Hey, nobody's perfect! XD Zomg. I'd date Kensuke, too. 'Cause hes such a little freak.

[]:             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Tue Sep 20, 2005 11:30 am While my kneejerk reaction to this question was a clear and cold "none of them because they're too f- etc. etc." On reflection I have to say that the women (and men) of Evangelion aren't much more fucked up then most of the people on the planet. Furthermore I think we've all dated a Asuka, Misato, and Shinji, I've even dated a Ritsuko. (yes, she was ten years older then me) I've never been with a Rei, but one of my cousins are a bit like her. The characters of Evangelion are a little overly dramatized but they are really just slightly exagerated versions of the average person. Back to the question though, I'd have to say Rei (she'd be my little pet project, I'd get her to socalize, laugh, have fun, simile a lot more) or Maya. (assuming she was into men)

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Sep 20, 2005 1:15 pm or Maya. (assuming she was into men)
